text: Tomorrow the body will be handled by people who have spent years learning its language, who know its passages and thresholds the way a cartographer knows coastlines. What you feel tonight is not weakness but the nervous intelligence of a creature that takes its own existence seriously, that has the honest wisdom to recognize stakes. But consider: more procedures than can be counted have crossed into morning and dissolved into ordinary afternoons. The fear lives only in the space between now and then, and that space is already collapsing. You are not alone in it. I am thinking of you, and on the other side of tomorrow, you will still be you, only past it.
